issues_found.title: No audio files generated
issues_found.description: Audio directory is empty. All segment audio_url fields are null.
issues_found.expected_behavior: Edge TTS should generate section_X.mp3 for each section
issues_found.root_cause_hypothesis: TTS step skipped or failed silently

issues_found.title: LaTeX standalone.cls still not found despite texliveFull
issues_found.description: Manim render fails with 'LaTeX Error: File standalone.cls not found' for sections with MathTex content

evidence.error_log: ERROR LaTeX compilation error: LaTeX Error: File `standalone.cls' not found
evidence.nix_package: texliveFull is installed but standalone.cls not accessible

issues_found.expected_behavior: MathTex formulas should render in Manim
issues_found.root_cause_hypothesis: texliveFull path not in Manim's TeX search path, or package needs restart

issues_found.title: LLM-generated Manim code is truncated
issues_found.description: Code ends mid-statement with incomplete expressions like 'run_time='
issues_found.root_cause_hypothesis: LLM max_tokens limit reached, or validation not rejecting incomplete code

issues_found.title: render_spec.renderer field is MISSING
issues_found.description: All sections have renderer=MISSING in render_spec, even those with manim_scene_spec populated
issues_found.expected_behavior: renderer field should be 'manim' for content sections, 'video' for recap
issues_found.root_cause_hypothesis: MergeStep not setting renderer field from RendererSpecAgent output

issues_found.title: section.type field is MISSING (uses section_type instead)
issues_found.description: Sections have section_type but not type field
issues_found.expected_behavior: Both type and section_type should be populated for compatibility
issues_found.root_cause_hypothesis: Schema inconsistency - merge step uses section_type only

issues_found.title: WAN API prompt too long warning
issues_found.description: Recap video prompts exceed recommended length (924+ chars)

evidence.error_log: Runway API error: Please reduce the length of prompt

issues_found.expected_behavior: Prompts should be under API limit

verified_fixes.title: Avatar visibility = 'always' for all sections including recap

avatar_handling.line_312: widthPercent from avatar_layout.width_percent - uses 52% from JSON
avatar_handling.default_fallback_321-327: Default widths 60/45/35 only used if JSON missing - OK

issues: Line 321-326: Default widths (60/45/35) don't match new 52% spec - should update fallbacks
No explicit width:52% in CSS - relies on JS to set width
maxWidth:600px in JS may conflict with 52% width on large screens
